summary: Crisp SBD capture of a high‑energy Cincinnati show with standout Blow Away, China > Rider and a soaring Box of Rain.
review: The soundboard recording is generally clear and crisp, giving listeners the full punch of an early‑April ’89 Saturday night in Cincinnati.  The band was on a roll – Brent’s keyboards were “jacked up,” Blow Away ignited the crowd, and the China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider sequence felt tight; Box of Rain closed the night on a sweet note.  A few reviewers note occasional muffling and one dissenting voice about an over‑the‑top Blow Away, but overall the performance shines.

ai_rating.rationale: Over 30 reviews consistently praise the musical performance and the SBD sound quality; only a handful of minor complaints keep the rating just below top‑tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Most reviewers describe the SBD as crisp, clear and well balanced. A few note that it isn’t as sharp as some other board recordings or mention occasional muffling, but no major drop‑outs.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
poor_songs: Blow Away (over‑done, according to one reviewer)
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set built a relaxed, party vibe that surged with Blow Away; the second set kept momentum with tight jams and space passages, though a few listeners felt the latter half lost some drive.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Consistently praised for strong lead guitar and vocal work; one reviewer noted a brief volume dip during a solo.
band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned mainly for filling in bass when Jerry’s volume slipped; otherwise not heavily spotlighted.
band_member_comments.Bob: Vocals described as powerful, especially on "Let the Good Times Roll" and other crowd‑pleasers.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboards) received abundant praise for energy, vocal contributions, and being “jacked up,” though one critic felt his vocals over‑did some songs.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey’s drumming noted as assertive with occasional effects; a few comments about gear/effects but overall solid.
